title: Babylonian Talmud, Sotah 49b: With the Footsteps of the Messiah
description: Sotah 49b: With the Footsteps of the Messiah
introduction: Sotah 49b: With the Footsteps of the Messiah

translation.text: With the footsteps of the Messiah arrogance shall increase and prices shall rise. Wisdom of scribes shall decay. The young shall shame the elders, and the elders shall stand before the young.
